ready.description: Codex CLI idle header or prompt glyph; confirmed present while ready.

pending.regex: (Messages to be submitted after next tool call|messages to be submitted at end of turn|queued follow-up inputs|\n\s*↳\s)

prompts.base: Count from 1 to 100 slowly, printing one number per second. Do not edit files.
prompts.follow_up_1: Now count from 101 to 150 slowly, printing one number per second.
prompts.follow_up_2: Now count from 151 to 200 slowly, printing one number per second.
prompts.follow_up_3_long: Analyze the trade-offs between synchronous and asynchronous API design for a distributed inventory service. Compare latency, consistency, failure modes, operational complexity, and developer ergonomics carefully. Recommend one primary approach with three concrete reasons and one counter-example where the other approach wins. Keep the response concise, avoid code examples, and conclude with a one-sentence executive summary for a non-technical audience. [CANARY-500-CHARS-PENDING]

steps.note: let text settle before pressing Enter
let the first prompt commit before submitting a follow-up
let text settle before pressing Enter
